subcodes.first_line: O thou blossom of the Tree of Life! Happy art thou to have girded thy loins in service
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شکوفه شجره حیات خوشا بحال تو که کمر خدمت بربستی و بتمام همت بر ترویج
subcodes.subjects: @growth and progress is gradual and according to capacity, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
